items.content_html: This AutoHotkey script tracks and logs left, right, and middle mouse clicks along with the date time and their x and y coordinates. It features automatic GUI updates and generates a visual heatmap via a Python script accessible from the system tray. Ideal for analyzing user interaction and creating detailed mouse activity maps.
items.title: RobThePCGuy/AHK-Mouse-Heatmap: This AutoHotkey script tracks and logs left, right, and middle mouse clicks along with the date time and their x and y coordinates. It features automatic GUI updates and generates a visual heatmap via a Python script accessible from the system tray. Ideal for analyzing user interaction and creating detailed mouse activity maps.

items.content_html: This tool requires AutoHotKey Dash. It simplifies creating macro key command scripts visually, eliminating manual script creation. Generate multiple key commands for any auto tools. For instance, convert scripts into .exe files for Huion Tablet buttons, streamlining creative art projects.
items.title: Toaster100/AutoHotKey-Macros-Generator-Tool: This tool requires AutoHotKey Dash. It simplifies creating macro key command scripts visually, eliminating manual script creation. Generate multiple key commands for any auto tools. For instance, convert scripts into .exe files for Huion Tablet buttons, streamlining creative art projects.

items.content_html: Radiology Right Click v1.0 is a radiologist's quantitative friend, designed to improve quantitative radiology and streamline workflow. This AutoHotkey script provides a suite of tools accessible via right-click, offering quick calculations and reference information for various radiological measurements and assessments.
